title: Integrations
description: Personal access tokens let external tools — coding agents, scripts, MCP clients — read project context and log time on your behalf. Everything they do is attributed to you and audited.
noTeam: You need to belong to a team before you can use integrations.
loadFailed: Couldn't load part of this page. Refresh to try again.

killSwitch.heading: Team integrations
killSwitch.defaultClosed: Integrations are off by default. Nothing outside Shyre can read or write this team's data until an owner or admin turns them on.
killSwitch.enabledCopy: External tools with a valid token can read this team's project context and log time for their token's owner.
killSwitch.disableWarning: Turning integrations off immediately blocks every existing token for this team.
killSwitch.memberHint: Ask your team owner or an admin to enable integrations for this team.

tokens.heading: Access tokens
tokens.empty: No tokens yet. Create one to connect an external tool.
tokens.revokeConfirmCopy: Integrations using this token stop working immediately.
tokens.revokeFailed: Couldn't revoke the token. Try again.

create.namePlaceholder: e.g. Claude Code on my laptop
create.nameRequired: Give the token a name so you can recognize it later.
create.expiryHint: Tokens always expire — one year is the maximum.
create.billableHint: Time logged through this token counts toward invoiceable work.
create.nonBillableHint: Time logged through this token is tracked but never invoiced.
create.billableExplain: One-time choice for this token: entries it logs land with this billable state so you don't clean them up per entry.
create.scopesHint: Tokens currently receive all four scopes.

showOnce.heading: Copy your token now
showOnce.warning: You will not see this token again. Shyre stores only a hash — copy it somewhere safe before closing this box.
showOnce.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — select the token text and copy it manually.

activity.heading: Recent API activity
activity.description: The last 20 API calls made with this team's tokens — successes and refusals both.

setup.heading: Connect a tool
setup.docsIntro: Full setup steps live in the feature guide:
setup.mcpIntro: To connect Claude Code, add Shyre as an MCP server with your token:
setup.copyFailed: Couldn't copy — select the command text and copy it manually.

errors.disabled: Integrations are disabled for this team. An owner or admin has to enable them before tokens can be created.
errors.adminOnly: Only team owners and admins can change integrations.
errors.revokeNotFound: Token not found or already revoked.
